_readme: チャンネル定義ファイル。アプリは1つ・設定はチャンネル別。api_env_prefix を設定すると、そのチャンネルは <PREFIX>_OPENAI_API_KEY / <PREFIX>_GEMINI_API_KEY / <PREFIX>_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY を優先使用（未設定なら共通キーにフォールバック）。Render の環境変数でキーを管理するとデプロイで消えず安全。

defaults.worldview_desc: Consistent warm, modern educational illustration world used throughout the whole video. Soft, cohesive color palette (warm tones with one calm accent color — not always blue). Clean flat-vector style with gentle shading, approachable and trustworthy mood. Keep the same character design, line weight, and palette across every scene so the video feels like one unified series.

ART STYLE / TONE (match this in EVERY illustration): a clean, simple, friendly FLAT CARTOON style like Japanese educational YouTube explainer videos. Thick, even, clean outlines. Flat cel-shading with minimal gradients and no heavy rendering. Soft rounded shapes, warm and approachable. Keep it SIMPLE and clean — do NOT make it detailed anime, do NOT make it semi-realistic, no heavy shadows or fine hatching. THE PROFESSOR (the channel's signature recurring character — use this EXACT design every time a teacher / professor / sensei / lecturer / explainer character appears): a friendly middle-aged Japanese man in his late 40s with a soft ROUNDED face and simple gentle features. Short dark-brown, slightly wavy and curly hair with a bit of volume on top. Thin dark rectangular eyeglasses. Small kind eyes and a gentle warm smile. Light skin. He ALWAYS wears a GRAY textured tweed blazer over a DARK RED (wine / maroon) V-neck sweater with a white collar. Warm, approachable, trustworthy teacher who often gestures with open hands as he explains. Keep his face, hairstyle, glasses, and gray-blazer-over-dark-red-sweater outfit IDENTICAL in every scene he appears in. A friendly young Japanese university student may appear as a secondary recurring character (same simple flat style). Palette: warm, trustworthy tones with one calm accent color (avoid all-blue monotony). Keep character design, line weight, color palette, and the simple flat-cartoon tone unified across every scene so the whole video looks like one cohesive series.

ART STYLE / TONE (match this in EVERY illustration and infographic): a clean, simple, highly readable educational YouTube explainer style for a serious-but-approachable geopolitics / world-history channel about Russia, the USSR and its neighbors. Organize information clearly, with no typos, no duplicated text and no crowded keyword lists. Infographics must be simple, structured and easy to understand at a glance; use rounded rectangles behind important text when it improves readability. Prefer realistic AI images, maps and clean infographics over decorative illustration when the manuscript mentions real places, people, events, institutions, routes or evidence. COLOR PALETTE: base background #D9E1E8, secondary background #A8B9C4, main #1B365D, comparison/sub #2C4C3B, neutral #E5A91A, warning #A6192E, focus #B7950B. Muted colors only; avoid high saturation and never display color codes inside the image. ILLUSTRATION STYLE ONLY WHEN ILLUSTRATION IS NECESSARY: warm retro hand-drawn textured illustration, rounded and simple soft shapes, gentle pastel colors, handwritten-feeling warm Japanese text if Japanese text is needed. THE NARRATOR (the channel's signature recurring character — use this EXACT design every time a narrator / explainer / guide character appears; the attached reference image is the authoritative design when provided): keep the same face, hairstyle, build, clothing and color palette in every scene the character appears in, changing only pose, expression and background. SIGNAGE: any signs, shop signs, street signs, billboards, documents or text that naturally appear in a scene MUST be in the LOCAL LANGUAGE of the depicted place (Russian / Cyrillic for Russia or the USSR; the local language elsewhere). Do NOT put Japanese labels inside realistic local scenery. Keep character design, line weight, color palette and tone unified across every scene so the whole video looks like one cohesive series.
defaults.user_instructions: 【ロシア解体新書 専用の品質指示】YouTubeの教養チャンネルにふさわしい、落ち着いた知的な資料感にする。情報を整理し、誤字・脱字・重複文字を出さない。インフォグラフィックは見やすくシンプルにし、キーワードの羅列ではなく、必ず「原因→結果」「比較」「流れ」「関係性」のどれか1つの構造で表す。可読性を高めるため、必要に応じてテキストの後ろに角丸シェイプを配置する。配色は背景色 #D9E1E8、サブ背景色 #A8B9C4、メイン #1B365D、サブ・比較 #2C4C3B、中立色 #E5A91A、警告色 #A6192E、注目色 #B7950B を基準にし、階層は内容に合わせて調整してよい。ただし彩度が高い色は禁止。カラーコードを画像内に表示することは禁止。冒頭10文は、抽象図解よりも実写・Web写真・地図を優先し、ニュース映像のような引きで始める。全体でも【実写風のAI画像／地図／インフォグラフィック】を多めにする。特に都市、国境、会談、デモ、軍事施設、歴史写真、地図、パイプライン、戦争・侵攻・崩壊などの現実感がある視覚を優先する。イラストが必要な場合のみ、温かみのあるレトロな手書き風テクスチャードイラストにする。人物や物体は丸みを帯びたシンプルで柔らかいデザイン、色彩はパステルカラー基調、文字は手書き風の温かみある日本語フォントにする。ロシア・旧ソ連・東欧・中央アジアの話題では、日本地図・日本列島・円マーク・日本円・東京の街並み・日本風の地名を出さない。通貨記号が必要な場合も、原稿に円が出ていない限り円マークは禁止。国や地域は原稿に出たものだけを使う。画像内テキストは最小限にし、同じ語を重複表示しない。グラフは使わず、数値比較もシンプルな図解として表す。

defaults.worldview_desc: ART STYLE / TONE (match this in EVERY illustration): a clean, practical, motivating educational explainer style for a business / self-improvement channel about habits, strategy, mindset, productivity and success principles. Prefer real-world business, workplace, founder, product, office, research, book, conference, classroom and documentary-like scenes when concrete people, companies, tools, books, data, institutions or cases are mentioned. Use simple flat-vector diagrams only when the sentence is truly conceptual. Keep the mood confident, calm and useful rather than flashy or emotional. Avoid vague luxury imagery, money worship, gambling-like visuals, exaggerated charisma, fake screenshots or unrealistic promises. Palette: crisp white background, deep teal as the main color, warm amber as the accent, charcoal text, light gray structure. Keep every scene readable at a glance and grounded in the exact manuscript.
defaults.user_instructions: 【成功の法則 専用ルーティング指示】一次情報とリアル画像を優先。実在の人物・企業・商品・本・論文・統計・講演・学校・研究機関・政府機関・公式発表・事例が出る文は、できるだけ web_photo を選ぶ。特定の公式画像が難しいが現実の場面で見せた方が伝わる文は realphoto を選ぶ。抽象概念だけの文は diagram。検索クエリは可能なら「公式」「論文」「統計」「年次報告書」「プレスリリース」「政府」「大学」「原典」「著者名」「企業名」など一次情報に近づく語を含める。成功・習慣・戦略の抽象イラストに逃げすぎず、実在資料・現場・人物・プロダクト・データの比率を高める。
